name: What benefits do I get for a work back injury in West Valley City?
description: Medicals, 2/3 wages, impairment pay in Utah—report to start.

mainEntity.name: What benefits do I get for a work back injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicals, 2/3 wages, impairment pay in Utah—report to start.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Medical expenses, temporary wage replacement (about 2/3 pay), and permanent impairment awards.**

Utah workers' comp covers treatment, lost wages until return, mileage, and lump sums for lasting back damage.[1] Future care may continue if related.

- Full medical paid (no copays if approved).
- 66-75% wages tax-free.
- Impairment rating for settlement.

File promptly; attorneys secure maximum via hearings if denied.[1] Track all costs.
